summary_en: Reported completion of buyback executed 2025-11-26 to 2025-12-19: 700,000 shares acquired for ¥909.98M, equating to 2.2% of post-treasury S/O at an average price of approximately ¥1,300.
summary_jp: 11月26日〜12月19日に70万株・9.0998億円（発行済2.2%）の自社株買いを完了。

summary_en: First 'management conscious of cost of capital' disclosure published, naming ROIC 30% as continuing target and introducing an explicit ¥7.3bn net-cash deployment framework over FY25-FY27.
summary_jp: 資本コスト経営の初回開示。ROIC30%目標を維持、ネットキャッシュ¥73億の活用方針を提示。
